label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 21

extraction.one_line_summary: MOLANO Juan Sebastian won the Madrid sprint stage after leading out ACKERMANN but having to continue when PEDERSEN threatened, EVENEPOEL secured overall by 2:02.
tactical_patterns: PLAPP and JOHANNESSEN stayed away dangerously late into technical Madrid finale, only caught at flamme rouge.
UAE put OLIVEIRA-MOLANO-ACKERMANN train but MOLANO didn't peel off when PEDERSEN positioned, suggesting leadout improvisation under pressure.
RODRIGUEZ Carlos hunted intermediate sprint bonus seconds against HINDSMAN but technical Madrid circuit denied time-gap opportunities.

rider_signals.PLAPP Luke: positive: aggressive showboating in ceremonial stage, smiling at crowd while still in breakaway near flamme rouge
rider_signals.MOLANO Juan Sebastian: positive: strong enough to continue leadout sprint and win accidentally when PEDERSEN threatened ACKERMANN
rider_signals.RODRIGUEZ Carlos: neutral: attempted GC bonus second hunting at intermediate sprint but technical circuit prevented meaningful gaps
